I used this years ago. Safe to say it's definitely gotten a lot worse. If you want to be spammed to high hell with "real" people, this is your app. Ads only appear when you leave the app to another one (like accidentally tapping the home button), or when it asks you to turn on notifications. It's super intrusive. And I logged into my old account with all my previous bots, but they were deleted after an ad appeared and I closed the page. I tried, but this app is super annoying now.
